DP.435.0000:
My big sister collects shards.\f
She says they remind her of the place
she worked at long ago.
DP.435.0001:
If you find ten shards of the same
color, please let me know.\f
I would gladly trade you a Technical
Machine for them.
DP.435.0002:
You’ve got ten shards in the same
color, haven’t you?\f
Would you like to trade them for
a Technical Machine?
DP.435.0003:
For your ten Red Shards, you get
this [0108,0000] [0106,0001].\f
DP.435.0004:
For your ten Blue Shards, you get
this [0108,0000] [0106,0001].\f
DP.435.0005:
For your ten Yellow Shards, you get
this [0108,0000] [0106,0001].\f
DP.435.0006:
For your ten Green Shards, you get
this [0108,0000] [0106,0001].\f
DP.435.0007:
You don’t want anything?
I feel unwanted...
DP.435.0008:
Oh, your Bag is full.\f
Giggle... It’s OK, I can trade
anytime. Next time will be fine.
DP.435.0009:
Red Shards: Sunny Day
Blue Shards: Rain Dance\r
Yellow Shards: Sandstorm\r
Green Shards: Hail\r
...The Weather Institute
